[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0110110110 6
1 0101100000 3
2 0001100110 4
3 1110001010 5
4 1000011010 4
5 0111001001 5
6 1010001101 5
7 1110100001 5

01 0111111111 9

23 0111111011 8
34 1011011111 8
45 1111101001 7
56 1010011111 7
67 1111111111 a
70 1101110101 7

72 1100110111 7
